Skip navigation links
  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    ActionMessage
    Represents a discrete action or message sent from the client to the server.
    AddStar
    Represents a ritual building that grants stars to the player.
    Artist
    Represents an Artist character in the game.
    Builder
    Represents a Builder character in the game.
    Building
    Base class for all building cards in the game.
    Card
    Base class for every card in the game, storing era and board position.
    CardLoader
    Loads cards and offer tiles from the JSON resources bundled with the application.
    CardLoader.BuildingsData
    Container used by Jackson to map the buildings.json structure.
    CardLoader.CharactersData
    Container used by Jackson to map the characters.json structure.
    CardLoader.EventsData
    Container used by Jackson to map the events.json structure.
    CardLoader.OfferTilesData
    Container used by Jackson to map the offer_tiles.json structure.
    CardLoader.TurnOrderTrackRule
    Rule applied when a player returns to a turn-order track slot.
    CardNode
    A custom JavaFX component representing a game card on the table.
    Character
    Base class for all character cards.
    CharacterType
    Defines the various types of characters available in the game.
    CheckRmi
    Small command-line utility that checks whether the RMI binding is reachable.
    ClientCallbackRemote
    RMI callback exposed by the client so the server can push asynchronous updates.
    ClientConnection
    Common abstraction for any connected client endpoint (Socket, RMI, ...).
    ClientGuiMain
    JavaFX-based GUI client for Mesos with Multi-Scene Navigation.
    ClientHandler
    Handles a single client connection on the server side.
    ClientMain
    The main entry point for the Mesos client application.
    ClientThread
    A background thread dedicated to asynchronously listening for incoming messages from the server.
    Color
    Represents the distinct colors that can be assigned to players.
    DbSettings
    Utility class responsible for loading MySQL persistence configuration.
    EndGame_Builder_Add
    End-game building that multiplies points contributed by builder characters.
    Endgame_Effect
    Building effect that grants end-game points based on matching character targets.
    Era
    Represents the different eras in the game Mesos.
    Event
    Base class for all event cards in the game.
    Event_Add_Effect
    Building effect that rewards the player when a specific event occurs.
    Event_Less_Ritual
    Represents a ritual building that provides protection for players with the minimum number of stars.
    Event_Most_Ritual
    Represents a ritual building that rewards the player with the highest star count.
    Event_Sustenance_Effect
    Building effect that reduces sustenance cost based on matching characters.
    EventContext
    Data container used to pass the current game context (like involved players) to event effects.
    EventType
    Enumerates the types of events that can occur during the game.
    Game
    Main model class representing the state of a Mesos game session.
    GameController
    Coordinates incoming commands from the network layer and translates them into operations on the Game model.
    GameResult
    Immutable representation of a finished match result.
    GameResultRepositories
    Factory for creating GameResultRepository instances from JSON defaults (db_config.json) and optional environment/system properties overrides.
    GameResultRepository
    Persists final match results.
    GameRoom
    Represents a single game room managing a distinct match, its controller, and connected players.
    GameServiceRemote
    RMI contract exposed by the server for Mesos clients.
    GameView
    Common interface for all Mesos game views (VirtualView, TUI, GUI).
    Gatherer
    Represents a Gatherer character in the game.
    Hunter
    Represents a Hunter character in the game.
    Hunting
    Represents a Hunting event in the game Mesos.
    ImageLoader
    Utility class to load and cache card images for the JavaFX client.
    InGame_Effect
    Represents a building that provides a continuous in-game effect.
    Inventor
    Represents an Inventor character in the game.
    InventorIcon
    Represents the various icons found on Inventor cards.
    Launcher
    A simple launcher class to bypass the JavaFX module path check.
    Lobby
    A thread-safe registry that manages game rooms and active client connections.
    MySqlGameResultRepository
    JDBC-based repository that stores match results in a MySQL database.
    NetworkSettings
    A utility class responsible for loading network configuration parameters.
    NoOpGameResultRepository
    No-op implementation used when persistence is disabled.
    OfferTile
    Represents an offer tile that defines the drafting requirements and possible bonuses.
    Player
    Represents a player in the game and stores their resources, cards, and tile assignments.
    PlayerScore
    Immutable per-player score snapshot at match end.
    Position
    Defines the possible positions of a card or a game element.
    RitualData
    Data container for tracking player participation and progress in a Shamanic Ritual.
    RitualEventContext
    Specialized event context that includes ritual-specific data.
    RmiClientAdapter
    Adapter for the RMI transport on the client side.
    RmiClientConnection
    Per-client server-side connection object used by RMI sessions.
    RmiGameService
    RMI implementation of the game service exposed by the Mesos server.
    RmiLoginRequest
    DTO for RMI login requests.
    RmiLoginResponse
    DTO for RMI login outcomes.
    RmiServerAdapter
    Adapter that boots and manages the RMI server-side transport.
    RmiVirtualView
    Server-side view proxy used for RMI clients.
    RockPaintings
    Represents a Rock Paintings event in the game Mesos.
    SerializedUpdate
    Represents a structured update or notification sent from the server to the client.
    ServerMain
    The main entry point for the Mesos server.
    Shaman
    Represents a Shaman character in the game.
    ShamanicRitual
    Represents a Shamanic Ritual event in the game Mesos.
    Sustenance
    Represents a Sustenance event in the game Mesos.
    Tribe
    Base type for every tribe card in the game.
    Turn_End_Card
    Represents a building that provides an effect triggered at the end of a round or turn.
    Turn_Start_Effect
    Represents a building that provides an effect triggered at the beginning of a round or turn.
    VirtualView
    Acts as the server-side proxy representing a remote client's view.
